verdict.label: CI_AND_LOCAL_ONLY
verdict.summary: WireMock runs locally via docker-compose.wiremock.yml and is exercised by PR #127 harness (9/9 pass). Preview API has mock-traffic DB seed enabled but no WireMock sidecar and no META_GRAPH_URL/GOOGLE_* overrides — platform sync jobs complete with liveSynced=false and zero campaigns/metrics pulled.

pr127.title: test(wiremock): Meta + Google platform integration harness
pr127.value: Adds pnpm wiremock:platform script exercising Meta/Google OAuth refresh + sync read paths against live stubs; fixes Google form-urlencoded refresh mapping.
pr127.mergeRecommendation: REBASE_THEN_MERGE — valuable harness, no runtime risk; resolve 2-file doc/mapping conflicts first.

POST /api/v2/integrations/accounts/{meta.note: Job completes but does not pull from WireMock — preview uses production platform URLs with mock DB tokens

GET /api/v1/auth/meta/connect.note: Requires session cookie or authenticated browser flow

GET /api/v1/auth/google/connect.note: Requires session cookie or authenticated browser flow

architecture.wiremockScope: Local docker-compose + optional CI (not wired in .github/workflows today)
architecture.mockTrafficScope: Preview DB seed only — seeds fake accounts/campaigns/metrics in Postgres, independent of WireMock HTTP stubs
architecture.previewGap: API container is single-service Dockerfile on Coolify; no internal wiremock:8080 sidecar; platform clients default to graph.facebook.com / googleads.googleapis.com

recommendedNextSteps: Rebase and merge PR #127 — local wiremock:platform harness is green and low-risk
Open/deploy WireMock preview sidecar (draft PR feat/wiremock-preview-sidecar-2026-06-13) with Coolify compose + META_GRAPH_URL=http://wiremock:8080 env overrides
After sidecar: re-run account sync and expect liveSynced=true with campaignsSynced>0 against stubs
Add wiremock:platform to CI (optional) — spin compose service in GitHub Actions before integration job
